articles.title: Laptops Powered by Intel "Wildcat Lake" Arrive in China, Starting at $449 - TechPowerUp
articles.description: China appears to be the first in line to receive laptops powered by Intel's "Wildcat Lake" Core 300 series processors, and the initial models have already arrived. The most affordable option is the CHUWI UniBook, which features a five-core Intel Core 3 304 pr…
